briefdescription.para: The main storage directory.
Reset an existing Table in the Storage.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation done. The result is bool.
optional. The name of the file. Default will drop the default storage file.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Key, const FVoidHandler OnDone, const FString &Filename=TEXT("DefaultFileName")) override
memberdef.name: DeleteItem

briefdescription.para: Delete an Item in the file.

parameterdescription.para: The Key of the Item.
This will be called when the operation done.
optional. The name of the file. Default will drop the default storage file.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString Key, FString Item, const THandler< bool > &OnDone, const FString &Filename=TEXT("DefaultFileName")) override
memberdef.name: SaveItemOverwiteEntireFile

briefdescription.para: Insert Item to a file by overwrite operation.

parameterdescription.para: The Key of the Item.
The Data to be inserted to the Table. The Data would be a FString.
This will be called when the operation done. The result is bool.
optional. The name of the table. Default will insert an item to the default KeyValue table.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Key, const TArray< uint8 > &Item, const THandler< bool > &OnDone, const FString &Filename=TEXT("DefaultFileName")) override
memberdef.name: SaveItem

briefdescription.para: Insert Item to the Key Value file.

parameterdescription.para: The Key of the Item.
The Data to be inserted to the file. The Data would be an array of uint8.
This will be called when the operation done. The result is bool.
optional. The name of the file. Default will insert an item to the default storage file.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Key, const FString &Item, const THandler< bool > &OnDone, const FString &Filename=TEXT("DefaultFileName")) override
memberdef.name: SaveItem

briefdescription.para: Insert Item to the Key Value file.

parameterdescription.para: The Key of the Item.
The Data to be inserted to the file. The Data would be a FString.
This will be called when the operation done. The result is bool.
optional. The name of the file. Default will insert an item to the default storage file.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Key, const FJsonObjectWrapper &Item, const THandler< bool > &OnDone, const FString &Filename=TEXT("DefaultFileName")) override
memberdef.name: SaveItem

briefdescription.para: Insert Item to the Key Value file.

parameterdescription.para: The Key of the Item.
The Data to be inserted to the file. The Data would be a FJsonObjectWrapper.
This will be called when the operation done. The result is bool.
optional. The name of the file. Default will insert an item to the default storage file.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Key, const THandler< TPair< FString, TArray< uint8 > > > &OnDone, const FString &Filename=TEXT("DefaultFileName")) override
memberdef.name: GetItem

param.type: const THandler< TPair< FString, TArray< uint8 > > > &

briefdescription.para: Get an Item from the Key Value file.

parameterdescription.para: The Key of the Item to Get.
This will be called when the operation done. The result is Pair of a FString Key, and an array of uint8 Value.
optional. The name of the file. Default will get an item from the default storage file.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Key, const THandler< TPair< FString, FString > > &OnDone, const FString &Filename=TEXT("DefaultFileName")) override
memberdef.name: GetItem

briefdescription.para: Get an Item from the Key Value file.

parameterdescription.para: The Key of the Item to Get.
This will be called when the operation done. The result is Pair of a FString Key, and a FString Value.
optional. The name of the file. Default will get an item from the default storage file.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Key, const THandler< TPair< FString, FJsonObjectWrapper > > &OnDone, const FString &Filename=TEXT("DefaultFileName")) override
memberdef.name: GetItem

briefdescription.para: Get an Item from the Key Value file.

parameterdescription.para: The Key of the Item to Get.
This will be called when the operation done. The result is Pair of a FString Key, and a FJsonObjectWrapper Value.
optional. The name of the file. Default will get an item from the default storage file.

briefdescription.para: Helper function.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &OldCacheFilename, const FString &NewCacheFilenameForTelemetry, const FString &NewCacheFilenameForGeneralPurpose) override
memberdef.name: ConvertExistingCache

briefdescription.para: Change the old JSON-Array structure into new-line ( ) separated JSON. Telemetry will be extracted from the old cache into a Telemetry specific cache. DeviceID & refresh token will be extracted as well into a GeneralPurpose cache.

parameterdescription.para: The targeted file that will be extracted

briefdescription.para: Convert the filename within the storage directory into fullpath.

parameterdescription.para: File name only, without any prefix.

simplesect.para: The complete absolute path of the file, appent by the storage directory.

briefdescription.para: Obtain the content of the specified file and return it.

parameterdescription.para: The name of the file, not the absolute path.

simplesect.para: The content of the file if the file exists. If value is not set, error did occur.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &FileName, const FString &Key, const TArray< uint8 > &Value)
memberdef.name: SaveToFile

briefdescription.para: Load the targeted file, modify the specified key, and then save it again.

parameterdescription.para: The name of the file, not the absolute path.
The key to store the specified value.
The array of byte that will be written based on the key.

briefdescription.para: Serialize an Array of Struct manually due to UE limitation Using Newline as delimiter.

parameterdescription.para: to the structure that will be serialized

briefdescription.para: Read file content and deserialize it.

parameterdescription.para: The name of the file, not the absolute path.

briefdescription.para: Deserialize string into an array string of FABBinaryFileStructure.

parameterdescription.para: The string that will be deserialized.

briefdescription.para: Check the existing file within the file storage directory.
Convert the old cache format into new cache format.

parameterdescription.para: The loaded old cache

simplesect.para: The deserialized cache in a new format

briefdescription.para: Migrate the value from the converted old cache into each new files.

parameterdescription.para: Cache that will be stored into new files.

briefdescription.para: Read file from Source directory then write to destination directory, effectively copying.

simplesect.para: returns true if copy is successful

detaileddescription.para: Migrate AccelByte-related cache files from one directory to another directory. AccelByteGeneralCache & AccelByteTelemetryCache are the affected files.

simplesect.para: returns true when there is no need to migrate or migrate success
returns false failed to migrate & need to fallback and use the old cache
